reviews.comment:
Me dejaron esperando 30 minutos de las 0550 a las 0620. Pq tenian q hacer un cambio de guardía de los Playeros. Y no me cargaron combustible.  Una  verguenza tener q esperar tanto. Asi q me fui

(Translated by Google)
They left me waiting for 30 minutes, from 5:50 AM to 6:20 AM, because they had to change the gas station attendants. And they didn't fill my tank. It was a disgrace to have to wait so long. So I left.

reviews.comment:
La estación tiene un minishop, las hamburguesas están buenas, pedí si le podían agregar algun aderezo picante, la respuesta fue: NO 🥺por qué ya vienen así. 😡

(Translated by Google)
The station has a mini-shop, the burgers are good, I asked if they could add some spicy sauce, the answer was: NO 🥺 because they already come like that. 😡

reviews.comment:
Cuando vas, aunque no haya otros autos he estado hasta 10min esperando que aparezca alguien para atenderme y me terminé yendo. El autodespacho nunca funciona los dias de promoción

(Translated by Google)
When I go, even when there are no other cars, I've waited up to 10 minutes for someone to show up and ended up leaving. The drive-thru never works on promotional days.

reviews.comment:
Una experiencia realmente maravillosa en la estación de servicio ACA Ushuaia.
Desde el salón, siempre impecable y confortable, hasta la calidad del servicio, todo invita a volver.
Pero lo más valioso, sin dudas, es su personal: respetuoso, generoso, atento y siempre dispuesto a ayudar con una sonrisa sincera.
Se siente el cuidado, la vocación y el compromiso en cada detalle.
Gracias por brindar mucho más que un servicio: brindan calidez humana en el fin del mundo.

(Translated by Google)
A truly wonderful experience at the ACA Ushuaia service station.

From the always spotless and comfortable lounge to the quality of the service, everything makes you want to return.

But the most valuable thing, without a doubt, is the staff: respectful, generous, attentive, and always willing to help with a genuine smile.
You can feel the care, dedication, and commitment in every detail.
Thank you for providing much more than just a service: you offer human warmth at the end of the world.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6208441069977197261/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21SbVYxUTNlbGd0ZW5adlJVcFdOblZNT0RCaFVVRRAB

reviews.comment:
Fui a utilizar el Full, tengo movilidad reducida, pude estacionar usar la rampa, llegar a la puerta y hasta ahí fue mi experiencia.
No pude abrir la puerta, mis brazos no tenias la fuerza suficiente para tirar de ella, estaba muy pesada por el tipo de cierre.
Casi muero como el penado 14 haciendo señas al encargado quien me miró y siguió con sus actividades.
Conclusión volví a mi auto y fui a otro lado.

(Translated by Google)
I went to use the Full service station. I have reduced mobility, and I was able to park, use the ramp, and get to the door, but that was the extent of my experience.
I couldn't open the door; my arms weren't strong enough to pull it. It was too heavy because of the type of latch. I almost died, like the guy in prison number 14, gesturing to the attendant, who just looked at me and went back to what he was doing.
In short, I went back to my car and went somewhere else.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6208441069977197261/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2swdE4wSldUV3RGV0VaYVNESnFTRmxqWWtsSmQwRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar ...y la limpieza y orden de los baños de lo mejor que he vistooo

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place...and the cleanliness and order of the bathrooms is the best I've ever seen!

reviews.comment:
Es una estación de servicio.
Puedes echar NAFTA acá.
Te atienden bien.
Puedes también chequear cosas de tu vehículo.
Puede echar aire a tus neumáticos.
Hay una tiendita para comprar comida o cosas varias.
Apaga el auto cuando eches la NAFTA :)

(Translated by Google)
It's a gas station.
You can fill up with gas here.
The service is good.
You can also have things checked on your vehicle.
You can inflate your tires.
There's a small shop where you can buy food or other things.
Turn off your car when you fill up with gas :)

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. I went twice, once seeking assistance and once to refuel. In both situations, I received excellent advice in one case and very courteous service while refueling.

reviews.comment:
Muy lindo pero cierran los baños de noche, eso no es un ACA entiendo que rompan pero justamente es acá por brindar ese servicio 24/7

(Translated by Google)
Very nice, but they close the bathrooms at night. That's not what an ACA should be. I understand why they break things, but it's precisely because they provide that 24/7 service that they're doing this.

reviews.comment:
Horrible la atención por parte de los playeros por lo menos de uno de ojos claros, la app funciona lenta y me apuro con el pago siendo desubicado. Horrible que tan linda estación haya playeros tan irrespetuosos

(Translated by Google)
The service from the attendants was awful, at least from one with light eyes. The app was slow, and he rushed me with the payment, which was rude. It's terrible that such a nice resort has such disrespectful attendants.
